allow: Bash(python -m poetry run ruff check services/api/rest_gateway/)
Bash(python -m poetry run python -c "from services.api.rest_gateway import create_rest_app; app = create_rest_app\(\); print\('OK', len\(app.routes\), 'routes'\)")
Bash(python -m poetry run python -c "import socket; s=socket.socket\(\); s.settimeout\(3\); r=s.connect_ex\(\('localhost', 5433\)\); s.close\(\); print\('Port 5433 reachable:', r == 0\)")
Bash(python -m poetry run alembic -c data_platform/alembic_migrations/alembic.ini upgrade head)
Bash(python -m poetry run python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('data_platform/alembic_migrations/versions/018_ml_and_execution_tables.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const { YahooFinance } = require\('yahoo-finance2'\); const yf = new YahooFinance\(\); yf.historical\('^JKSE', { period1: new Date\(Date.now\(\) - 30*86400000\), period2: new Date\(\), interval: '1d' }\).then\(r => console.log\('OK, points:', r.length\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('Error:', e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const yf = require\('yahoo-finance2'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(yf\)\); console.log\('default:', typeof yf.default\); console.log\('hasHistorical:', typeof yf.default?.historical, typeof yf.historical\);")

Bash(node -e "const YF = require\('yahoo-finance2'\).default; const yf = new YF\(\); yf.historical\('^JKSE', { period1: new Date\(Date.now\(\) - 30*86400000\), period2: new Date\(\), interval: '1d' }\).then\(r => console.log\('OK with interval:', r.length\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('FAIL with interval:', e.message.substring\(0, 200\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const YF = require\('yahoo-finance2'\).default; const yf = new YF\({ suppressNotices: ['yahooSurvey','ripHistorical'] }\); \(async \(\) => { try { const a = await yf.historical\('^JKSE', { period1: new Date\(Date.now\(\) - 30*86400000\), period2: new Date\(\), interval: '1d' }\); console.log\('with interval 1d:', a.length\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('with interval FAIL:', e.message.substring\(0,150\)\); } try { const b = await yf.historical\('^JKSE', { period1: new Date\(Date.now\(\) - 30*86400000\), period2: new Date\(\) }\); console.log\('without interval:', b.length\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('without interval FAIL:', e.message.substring\(0,150\)\); } }\)\(\);")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Id 23660, 25232 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=sys.stdin.read\(\); [line.strip\(\) for line in data.split\('STATUS'\) if line.strip\(\)]; s=data.split\('STATUS'\)[0]; st=data.split\('STATUS='\)[1].strip\(\); print\('status:', st\); d=json.loads\(s\);print\('points:', len\(d['points']\), 'current:', d['current']\)")
